title: Hello Pipeline Parameters
description: A super simple hello world pipeline

input.description: Path to input file or samplesheet
input.help_text: Use this to specify the location of your input file(s). Can be a local path or a path within a mounted data link.

outdir.description: The output directory where results will be saved
outdir.help_text: You can browse and select from your mounted data links in Seqera Platform.
